rulings.Case Title: PATRICK BURKE, ET AL VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B/P)AS RELFECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION For Order Compelling Responses To Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories And Request For Production Of Documents And Having Subject Matter Of Request For Admissions Deemed Admitted And For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Wednesday, March 9, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 1. Defendant Cummins Engine Company¿s motion to compel responses to form interrogatories, special interrogatories and request for production and request for admissions deemed admitted and for sanctions is denied as untimely. Defendant failed to give proper notice pursuant to C.C.P. § 1005(b). = (220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: LUISA NICHOLS et al VS. A.W. CHESTERTON COMPANY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Plaintiffs Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel The Taking Of Deposition Of Defendant Goodyear Tire Rubber Companys Pmk
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Wednesday, March 9, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 4. Plaintiffs¿ motion to compel the taking of depositions of Goodyear Tire & Rubber Co.¿s production at deposition of its person most knowledgeable, custodian of records and requested documents. The motion is continued to March 10. Pursuant to CCP 639(a)(5) and CRC 3.920(a), appointment of a discovery referee is warranted. The parties are ordered to meet and confer in an effort to agree on a referee. If the parties cannot agree, each side (plaintiffs being one side and all defendants remaining in the case being one side) must submit the names of three nominees to all parties and the court (by email to contestasbestostr@sftc.org) by Wednesday March 9 at 5:00pm. The parties will then have until the hearing at 9:00am on Thursday March 10 to object to the nominees. Each side may object to up to two nominees from the other side. Each nominee should be able to immediately start resolving discovery disputes. This appointment applies to all motions regarding any defendant¿s person most knowledgeable deposition and related document production, as well as any other issues the parties agree to submit to the referee, and any other motions or application later added by court order. Defendants may proceed either through Berry & Berry or on their own. This tentative ruling will apply to all motions filed by plaintiffs regarding defendant¿s PMK deposition that are set to be heard on March 9 and 10. Plaintiffs¿ counsel must provide a copy of this tentative ruling to all remaining defendants in this action by 4pm on Tuesday March 8. = (220/HEK)

Defendants may proceed either through Berry & Berry or on their own. This tentative ruling will apply to all motions filed by plaintiffs regarding defendant¿s PMK deposition that are set to be heard on March 9 and 10. Plaintiffs¿ counsel must provide a copy of this tentative ruling to all remaining defendants in this action by 4pm on Tuesday March 8. = (220/HEK)
